title: Netherite Greatsword
description: A larger, more enticing netherite sword that feels oh so much more powerful to swing at your enemies while keeping the vanilla look.
body:
### It's finally done!

This resource pack brings all your oversized weapon fantasies to ~~life~~, more reasonably so into the game. Instead of the puny, tiny and absolutely dull regular netherite sword, you have the netherite greatsword. A colossal, absolutely stunning sword to add to your collection of pvp texture packs. If you want obviously.

**this should work with most versions *1.16.5 and higher*, so don't worry about it being "incompatible."**

getting this resource pack means a lot to me support wise. cheers!
